landing.title: Tutorial round
landing.label: Mission info
landing.descriptionIntro: Welcome aboard, Captain. Your journey has begun, we’ve set course for Intara. While in transit, let’s prepare for the mission ahead. Your first Uplink from Mission Control is now available. Watch the video to get started.
landing.subtitle: Start your mission
landing.description: Now that you have watched the first Uplink, you are ready to start your mission. For the duration of your journey to Intara, you will be able to practice your trading skills with the provided tools in the dashboard.
landing.mobileDescription: This mission continues on desktop. Switch devices to keep playing Prosperity.

ariaUplink.title: A.R.I.A. UPLINK
ariaUplink.intro: This Uplink was shared with you at the beginning of this round. You can review the Uplink at any time.

algoChallenge.title: Simulator practice
algoChallenge.description: Use the provided virtual goods and data to develop a strategy and convert it into a Python program. Upload your program to the network and instantly see how it performs in a controlled market simulation. This is for practice only.

dataCapsule.title: Data Capsule
dataCapsule.intro: This data capsule provides historical market data for the available tradable goods.
dataCapsule.body: Download the capsule and use the data to develop your trading strategy.

missionOverview.label: Round 1 | intara
missionOverview.title: Trading groundwork
missionOverview.description: You have reached Intara and are setting up a Trade Outpost to act as your trading hub on this planet. Your goal: earn at least a net 200,000 XIRECs by the end of Round 2.

ariaUplink.title: A.R.I.A. Uplink
ariaUplink.intro: Review the A.R.I.A. Uplink from the current round
ariaUplink.body: This A.R.I.A. Uplink contains all the basic information needed to start working on your strategy and Python program.

algoChallenge.title: First Intarian goods
algoChallenge.description: Start building your Python program with the first two available tradable goods: Ash-coated Osmium and Intarian Pepper Root. Use the historical data from the Data Capsule to develop a profitable strategy, translate it to a Python program and upload it to the network.

dataCapsule.title: Data Capsule
dataCapsule.intro: This Data Capsule contains historical performance data for all available tradable goods.
dataCapsule.body: Download the data file to analyze the performance history of Ash-Coated Osmium and Intarian Pepper Root.

labels.confirmOrder: Confirm your order. You can re-submit orders until the end of the round.

introduction.title: An intarian welcome
description: As a special welcoming event, the Intarians are organizing an exchange auction. You will have access to two stale order books: one for Dryland Flax and one for Ember Mushroom. You can put in one order per tradable good. When the auction clears, it will execute with price-time priority and there will be no more continuous trading to parttake in. How might you turn this celebratory opportunity into profit?
This is a one-time opportunity and does not affect your algorithmic trading activities. Enter your submission below and click Submit to confirm.

orderBook1.title: Dryland flax ORDER BOOK
orderBook1.description: This order book shows a stale state of bids and asks for Dryland Flax. Use this to determine your own strategy and order input. Any Dryland Flax you acquire will be sold directly after the auction closes for 30 XIRECs per piece.

orderBook2.title: Ember mushroom ORDER BOOK
orderBook2.description: This order book shows a stale state of bids and asks for Ember Mushroom. Use this to determine your own strategy and order input. Trading fees per volume apply: 0.05 XIRECs for buying and 0.05 XIRECs for selling. Any Ember Mushroom you acquire will be sold directly after the auction closes for 20 XIRECs per piece.

formProducts.label: Dryland Flax
formProducts.description: Select order type from the dropdown, enter your volume and price. Don't forget to submit your order.

formProducts.label: Ember Mushroom
formProducts.description: Select order type from the dropdown, enter your volume and price. Don't forget to submit your order.

missionOverview.label: Round 2 | Intara
missionOverview.title: Growing your outpost
missionOverview.description: You have one more round to make your mission on Intara a success and generate a total profit of 200,000 XIRECs or more. You'll have the opportunity to gain access to additional trade volume and you have received a budget to invest in Research, Scale and Speed, to accelerate the growth of your outpost. Make this round count.

ariaUplink.title: A.R.I.A. Uplink
ariaUplink.intro: Review the A.R.I.A. Uplink from the current round
ariaUplink.body: This A.R.I.A. Uplink contains all the basic information needed to start working on your strategy and Python program.

algoChallenge.title: Limited Market Access
algoChallenge.description: You may include a Market Access Fee (MAF) in your Python program to gain access to an additional 25% of quotes. Only the top 50% of total MAFs will secure the contract, pay the MAF, and access this additional 25%. Others will not have to pay their MAF and will continue trading with the original volume allocation.

dataCapsule.title: DATA CAPSULE
dataCapsule.intro: This Data Capsule contains historical performance data for all available tradable goods.
dataCapsule.body: Download the data file to analyze the performance history of Ash-Coated Osmium and Intarian Pepper Root.

labels.yourTaskDescription: Distribute your budget across the three pillars below.
labels.confirmOrder: Confirm your order. You can re-submit orders until the end of the round.

introduction.title: Invest & expand
description: You've been granted a substantial budget to expand your trading outpost. You have 50,000 XIRECs at your disposal to invest across three growth pillars: Research, Scale, and Speed.
Investments in Research are directed toward quantitative research, data acquisition, machine learning infrastructure, backtesting systems, and related capabilities.
Budget allocated to Scale supports traders, engineers, offices, exchange access, and other factors that allow your operations to expand.
Investments in Speed are applied to technologies such as FPGA boards, colocation, RF towers, microwave links, and other latency-reducing infrastructure.
This is a one-time opportunity and does not affect your algorithmic trading activities. Enter your submission below and click Submit to confirm.

researchTooltip.label: Research forecast
researchTooltip.tooltip: This number represents the expected return on your investment

scaleTooltip.label: Scale forecast
scaleTooltip.tooltip: This multiplier represents the expected return on your investment

chart.titleTemplate: PNL VS VOLUME AT BID PRICE: {price}
chart.noChartData: PNL VS VOLUME AT BID PRICE: {price} (no chart data)

missionOverview.label: Round 3 | Solvenar
missionOverview.title: Gloves off
missionOverview.description: Welcome to Solvenar. The Great Orbital Ascension Trials begin now. Profit and Loss indicators and the leaderboard have been reset. It's anyone's game now. Three trading rounds remain to prove you are the trading champion of the galaxy.

ariaUplink.title: A.R.I.A. Uplink
ariaUplink.intro: Review the A.R.I.A. Uplink from the current round
ariaUplink.body: This A.R.I.A. Uplink contains all the basic information needed to start working on your strategy and Python program.

algoChallenge.title: Options require decisions
algoChallenge.description: You have three new tradable goods available to trade with. Incorporate these Hydrogel Packs, Velvetfruit Extracts, and Velvetfruit Extract Vouchers (VEVs) into your strategy and translate it into a new Python program to upload to the network.

dataCapsule.title: DATA CAPSULE
dataCapsule.intro: This Data Capsule contains historical performance data for all available tradable goods.
dataCapsule.body: Download the data file to analyze the performance history of Hydrogel Packs and Velvetfruit Extract.
dataCapsule.body2: All the Velvetfruit Extract Vouchers have a Time To Expiry (TTE) of 7 Solvenarian days, starting from day 1. The available VEVs are:

labels.yourTaskDescription: Each team may submit two price offers (between 670 and 920 XIRECs) for a chance to trade. The so-called “Guardeners” of the Guild will accept the lowest bid that exceeds their personal reserve price. For the second offer, they’ll also factor in the global average bid submitted by other crews. If your bid is above that average, you’re likely to close the deal. But if it falls below, the probability of a trade decreases sharply. Don’t forget to submit your bids when you are ready.
labels.lowestBidExceedsHighest: Lowest bid must not be higher than highest bid
labels.confirmOrder: Confirm your order. You can re-submit orders until the end of the round.

introduction.title: The Celestial Gardeners' Guild
description: The Celestial Gardeners' Guild is making a rare appearance on Solvenar during the Great Orbital Ascension Trials!

They’ve brought a limited supply of Ornamental Bio-Pods and are offering a one-time opportunity to trade with participating crews. After this round, the Guild will continue their trade mission to another planet, where they’ll attempt to sell any remaining Bio-Pods. This is a one-time opportunity and does not affect your algorithmic trading activities. Enter your submission below and click Submit to confirm.

missionOverview.label: Round 04 | Solvenar
missionOverview.title: The more the merrier
missionOverview.description: The Frontier Trade Watch disclosed information about the counterparties active on the market. These counterparties also provide new opportunities in the form of some interesting option contracts.

ariaUplink.title: A.R.I.A. Uplink
ariaUplink.intro: Review the A.R.I.A. Uplink from the current round
ariaUplink.body: This A.R.I.A. Uplink contains all the basic information needed to start working on your strategy and Python program.

algoChallenge.title: Hello, I'm Mark
algoChallenge.description: The FTW has identified your trading counterparties as products of several local neuro-robotics research programs. Surprisingly, they are all named “Mark” followed by a number. These IDs have been added to the historical trade data in the Data Capsule. Use this information to re-evaluate your strategy for trading Hydrogel Packs, Velvetfruit Extract, and VEVs.

dataCapsule.title: DATA CAPSULE
dataCapsule.intro: This Data Capsule contains historical performance data for all available tradable goods.
dataCapsule.body: Download the data file to analyze the performance history of Hydrogel Packs and Velvetfruit Extract and gain insight into counterparty trading behavior.
dataCapsule.body2: All the Velvetfruit Extract Vouchers have a Time To Expiry (TTE) of 7 Solvenarian days, starting from day 1. The available VEVs are:

labels.yourTaskDescription: Enter your orders directly in the table. Orders are limited by the available volume.
labels.invalidFormData: Invalid form data. Please check your entries.
labels.confirmOrder: Confirm your order. You can re-submit orders until the end of the round.

description.content: For this trading round only, you have the opportunity to trade the beautiful Aether Crystal, along with a collection of option contracts based on it. Each contract has a contract size of
. Some of these contracts are more “exotic” than others. With the right strategy, they offer the potential for substantial additional profit.

Carefully review the details of all available contracts to understand the full range of possibilities. You may trade as many contracts as you wish, limited only by the available volume per contract. Enter your orders (side and volume) directly in the table and remember to submit them. This is a one-time opportunity and does not affect your algorithmic trading activities. Enter your submission below and click Submit to confirm.

) are precision-grown minerals formed under controlled electromagnetic conditions. Each crystal stores and stabilizes ambient energy fluctuations, making them invaluable in advanced communication systems, architectural harmonics, and precision instrumentation.

missionOverview.label: Round 05 | Solvenar
missionOverview.title: The final stretch
missionOverview.description: In this final round, you will have 50 new tradable goods available to build a final Python program with. You've also been invited to trade on the market of our neighboring planet, Ignith. Inform yourself by reading through their news source “Ashflow Alpha” before making a final move on their heated market.

ariaUplink.title: A.R.I.A. Uplink
ariaUplink.intro: Review the A.R.I.A. Uplink from the current round
ariaUplink.body: This A.R.I.A. Uplink contains all the basic information needed to start working on your strategy and Python program.

algoChallenge.title: Cherry-picking winners
algoChallenge.description: The FTW introduced 50 new tradable goods to replace the previous ones. Fortunately, they have been categorized to provide a clear overview. Find the ones you can build a profitable strategy around and create a final Python program with them.

dataCapsule.title: DATA CAPSULE
dataCapsule.intro: This Data Capsule contains historical performance data for all available tradable goods.
dataCapsule.body: Download the data file to analyze the performance history of all available tradable goods.

labels.yourTaskDescription: Choose which tradable goods you would like to trade on the Ignith market.
labels.invalidFormData: Invalid form data. Please check your entries.

feeTooltip.label: Click for more information
feeTooltip.description: Trading fees apply for these tradable goods. The more you trade in one good, the more expensive it will get.

labels.confirmOrder: Confirm your order. You can re-submit orders until the end of the round.

introduction.title: Extra! Extra! Read all about it!
description: You have the unique opportunity to trade on the Ignith market for this final round only. This neighboring planet is known for its volcanic scenery and heated market dynamics. You'll have a set budget of 1,000,000 XIRECs and access to their primary new source, “Ashflow Alpha” to make informed decisions.

Be aware that there are trading fees involved, tied to the volume per product you choose to trade. Analyze the Ashflow Alpha articles to spot opportunities and develop your strategy for this final manual challenge. This is a one-time opportunity and does not affect your algorithmic trading activities. Enter your submission below and click Submit to confirm.

introduction.title: Will it be Enough?
introduction.description: Two whole trading rounds have passed since you first set foot here on the dry plains of Intara. You've worked hard, giving it your all to help the Intarian people build a solid trading foundation. But will it be enough? The eXtended Interplanetary Resource Exchange Network was clear from the beginning; only if you are able to secure at least 200,000 XIRECs will your mission be regarded as a success.

title: Intara
Mission Results
status.description: Your final Python program has been processed by the network. Your Round 2 PnL has been processed into your Profit and Loss indicator. Your updated total now reflects your results for this Intara mission. Did you manage to secure enough?

title: Your Future
Depends on It
motivation.description: A successful mission will not only help the Intarian people build a strong trading foundation, but it will also significantly boost your reputation as a legitimate trading crew. Success on Intara will most likely lead to more exciting and challenging missions in the near future.

roundResults.label: Round 2 | complete
roundResults.title: Your results are in
roundResults.description: Here is a compact breakdown of your Round 2 results. Will it be enough to reach the 200,000 threshold?

results.descriptionQualified: Congratulations! You secured enough profit to complete your mission successfully. Your outpost is now an official trade node within the network.
results.descriptionNotQualified: Your crew gave it everything but still fell short of the required profit. Your mission ends here.

restPeriod.descriptionQualified: Congratulations. You managed to secure more than 200,000 XIRECs in just two trading rounds. Impressive work! You're part of an elite group of traders that have shown the people of Intara how to properly set up profitable trading activities. Your mission was a great success. Now is the time to celebrate your achievement, rest and recharge. An exciting future awaits.
restPeriod.descriptionNotQualified: This mission on Intara has been challenging from the start. The profit target was ambitious, and unfortunately your final results were not sufficient to move forward. This is where your mission ends. Head home, regroup, and use this experience to strengthen your strategy for future trading challenges. Thank you for playing IMC Prosperity 4.

steps01Qualified.title: Step
steps01Qualified.description: Review your Round 2 performance and see where you finished on the leaderboard. Share and celebrate your achievement with your personalized Mission Milestone below.

steps02Qualified.title: Step
steps02Qualified.description: Prepare to depart Intara within the next 48 hours. A new trading adventure awaits. Your trading data will be safely stored and remain available in future stages of your journey.

steps03Qualified.title: Step
steps03Qualified.description: Once you leave Intara, the journey to your next destination will take 48 hours. You will be notified as soon as you enter this new phase of your mission.

steps01NotQualified.title: Pack up
steps01NotQualified.description: Prepare to depart Intara within the next 48 hours. After that period, the leaderboard will reset. You can still return to the platform to review your files and performance results.

steps02NotQualified.title: Be proud
steps02NotQualified.description: Competing in Prosperity is an accomplishment in itself. Take a moment to review your final leaderboard standing and the badges you earned along the way. Share your achievement with a personalized Mission Milestone below.

steps03NotQualified.title: Stay involved
steps03NotQualified.description: Follow the rest of the Prosperity competition through the Discord community. See how other teams compete to become the trading champion of the galaxy and cheer them on.

qualified.title: I am an IMC Prosperity 4 finalist
qualified.description: I successfully completed Mission 1 with my team {teamName}

introduction.label: Mission Location
introduction.title: Destination: Solvenar
introduction.subtitle: An invitation to the G.O.A.T.
introduction.description: An encrypted transmission has arrived from Solvenar, one of the most prosperous worlds in the Centaurus A cluster.
introduction.description2: Your crew has been invited to participate in the Great Orbital Ascension Trials (G.O.A.T.), a legendary event designed to settle a long-standing dispute: Who truly is the greatest trading crew in the galaxy?
introduction.description3: You have set course for Solvenar. Arrival in approximately 48 hours.
